expectations.text: own_company_highlighted: Is the 自社 column visually differentiated?
expectations.evidence: `.price-card.highlight` has accent border (var(--accent)) and accent-bg background with '推奨' badge; `thead th.th-highlight` has accent background; `td.cell-highlight` has accent-bg with accent-colored bold text

expectations.text: all_four_items: Are 価格, API連携, 日本語対応, サポート all present?
expectations.evidence: Table rows: '月額価格', 'API 連携', '日本語対応', 'サポート体制' all present as tbody td:first-child row labels

expectations.text: correct_values: Are the prices (¥5,000/¥8,000/¥3,500) and symbols correct?
expectations.evidence: 自社: ¥5,000 with ◎ (日本語), ○ (API), 24時間対応 (サポート); A社: ¥8,000 with △ (日本語), ○ (API); B社: ¥3,500 with ○ (日本語), ✕ (API)
`<button class='export-btn' id='exportBtn'>↓ PPTX 書き出し</button>`; pptxgenjs@3.12.0 + html2canvas@1.4.1 loaded; full async export function with 2-slide generation
